name: Streaming skeleton list (Vue 3)
algorithm: An injected async-iterable source is pulled in a loop; before the first item a shimmer skeleton shows. Arrivals append rows and emit item, but live-region announcements are throttled: a single interval flushes a summary every announceEvery ms and stops itself when no rows are pending. A Stop control sets an abort flag and calls iterator.return() so generators run their finally; states resolve to stopped/done/error.
reduced_motion: Skeleton shimmer and activity pip animation stop and new rows insert instantly under prefers-reduced-motion.
responsive_behaviour: fluid up to 36rem; rows wrap; no fixed pixel motion
browser_support: All modern browsers; relies on async iterators and TransitionGroup.
accessibility: Single polite role=status region carries throttled summaries (no per-row spam); skeleton aria-hidden; Stop/Restart are 44px keyboard-reachable buttons; focus is never moved as rows arrive.
